question: Provide the area, production, and yield statistics for maize and barley in Chhattisgarh for the year 1970.
sql: SELECT T0.MAIZE_AREA_1000HA, T0.MAIZE_PRODUCTION_1000TONS, T0.MAIZE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA, T0.BARLEY_AREA_1000HA, T0.BARLEY_PRODUCTION_1000TONS, T0.BARLEY_YIELD_KG_PER_HA FROM FACT_CEREALS_MINOR T0 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY T1 ON T0.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR T2 ON T0.YEAR_ID = T2.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T2.YEAR = '1970';

question: Provide the maize and barley production and area statistics for all districts in Chhattisgarh for the year 1970, sorted by district name.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME, T2.YEAR, T0.MAIZE_AREA_1000HA, T0.MAIZE_PRODUCTION_1000TONS, T0.BARLEY_AREA_1000HA, T0.BARLEY_PRODUCTION_1000TONS FROM FACT_CEREALS_MINOR T0 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY T1 ON T0.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR T2 ON T0.YEAR_ID = T2.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T2.YEAR = '1970' ORDER BY T1.DIST_NAME

question: For the year 1970 in Chhattisgarh, provide the production statistics for maize and barley across districts where more than 2,000 hectares were dedicated to maize, sorted by the largest maize area.
sql: SELECT SUM(T1.MAIZE_AREA_1000HA), SUM(T1.MAIZE_PRODUCTION_1000TONS), AVG(T1.MAIZE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA), SUM(T1.BARLEY_AREA_1000HA), SUM(T1.BARLEY_PRODUCTION_1000TONS), AVG(T1.BARLEY_YIELD_KG_PER_HA), T2.DIST_NAME FROM FACT_CEREALS_MINOR AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T1.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR = '1970' GROUP BY T2.DIST_NAME HAVING SUM(T1.MAIZE_AREA_1000HA) > 2.0 ORDER BY SUM(T1.MAIZE_AREA_1000HA) DESC

question: Compare the average yields of rice and maize for each state during the year 1970.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, AVG(T2.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA), AVG(T3.MAIZE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MINOR AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR = '1970' GROUP BY T1.STATE_NAME

question: Provide a state-wise comparison of the average rice and maize yields for the year 1970, ordered alphabetically by state name.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, AVG(T2.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA), AVG(T3.MAIZE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MINOR AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR = '1970' GROUP BY T1.STATE_NAME ORDER BY T1.STATE_NAME ASC

question: For the year 1970, provide a state-wise breakdown of the average yields for rice and maize, sorted alphabetically by state name.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, AVG(T2.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA), AVG(T3.MAIZE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MINOR AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID AND T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR = '1970' GROUP BY T1.STATE_NAME ORDER BY T1.STATE_NAME ASC

question: Which districts in Chhattisgarh achieved a rice yield exceeding 828.55 kg per hectare during the year 1970?
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T2.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA > 828.55 AND T3.YEAR = '1970'

question: Which districts in Chhattisgarh achieved a rice yield exceeding 337.59 kg per hectare during the year 1970?
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T2.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA > 337.59 AND T3.YEAR = '1970'

question: Identify the districts in Chhattisgarh that achieved an average rice yield greater than 337.59 kg per hectare in 1970, ranked from highest to lowest yield.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR = '1970' GROUP BY T1.DIST_NAME HAVING AVG(T2.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) > 337.59 ORDER BY AVG(T2.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) DESC

question: Rank the districts in Chhattisgarh by their rice yield for the year 1970, from highest to lowest.
sql: SELECT T2.DIST_NAME, T1.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA FROM FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T1.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR = '1970' ORDER BY T1.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA DESC

question: Rank the districts in Chhattisgarh by their rice yield for the year 1970, showing the highest yields first.
sql: SELECT T2.DIST_NAME, T1.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA FROM FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T1.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR = '1970' ORDER BY T1.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA DESC

question: Rank the districts of Chhattisgarh by their average rice yield for the year 1970, from highest to lowest.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME, AVG(T2.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR = '1970' GROUP BY T1.DIST_NAME ORDER BY AVG(T2.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) DESC

question: List the top 10 districts in Chhattisgarh that had the highest rice yield in 1970.

question: List the top 10 districts in Chhattisgarh that had the highest rice yield in 1970.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR = '1970' ORDER BY T2.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA DESC LIMIT 10

question: Which 10 districts in Chhattisgarh had an average rice yield exceeding 337.59 kg per hectare in 1970, ranked by their highest recorded yields?
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR = '1970' GROUP BY T1.DIST_NAME HAVING AVG(T2.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) > 337.59 ORDER BY MAX(T2.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) DESC LIMIT 10

question: Compare the rice and maize yields for all districts in Chhattisgarh during the year 1970.
sql: SELECT T2.DIST_NAME, T1.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA, T3.MAIZE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA FROM FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MINOR AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T1.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T4.YEAR = '1970';

question: Provide a comparison of rice and maize yields across different districts in Chhattisgarh for the year 1970, sorted alphabetically by district name.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME, T2.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA, T3.MAIZE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MINOR AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T4.YEAR = '1970' ORDER BY T1.DIST_NAME

question: For the year 1970, provide the average rice and maize yields for each district in Chhattisgarh, sorted by the highest rice productivity.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME, AVG(T2.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA), AVG(T3.MAIZE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MINOR AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID AND T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T4.YEAR = '1970' GROUP BY T1.DIST_NAME ORDER BY AVG(T2.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) DESC

question: Which districts reported a positive maize yield in 1970 but had no recorded wheat production?
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MINOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR = '1970' AND T2.MAIZE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA > 0 AND (T3.WHEAT_YIELD_KG_PER_HA IS NULL OR T3.WHEAT_YIELD_KG_PER_HA = 0) GROUP BY T1.DIST_NAME ORDER BY T1.DIST_NAME ASC

question: List the names of districts that produced maize but did not produce any wheat during the year 1970, sorted alphabetically.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MINOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR = '1970' AND T2.MAIZE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA > 0 AND T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID NOT IN ( SELECT T5.GEOGRAPHY_ID FROM FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T5 JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T6 ON T5.YEAR_ID = T6.YEAR_ID WHERE T6.YEAR = '1970' AND T5.WHEAT_YIELD_KG_PER_HA > 0 ) GROUP BY T1.DIST_NAME ORDER BY T1.DIST_NAME ASC

question: Which districts achieved a rice yield higher than 841.27 kg/ha while also dedicating more than 2,800 hectares to maize cultivation in 1970?
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MINOR AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR = '1970' AND T2.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA > 841.27 AND T3.MAIZE_AREA_1000HA > 2.8

question: Which districts in 1970 achieved a rice yield higher than 841.27 kg/ha while also maintaining more than 2,800 hectares of maize cultivation?
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MINOR AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR = '1970' AND T2.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA > 841.27 AND T3.MAIZE_AREA_1000HA > 2.8

question: List the names of districts that, in 1970, recorded a rice yield higher than 337.59 kg/ha and a maize cultivation area exceeding 2,500 hectares, sorted alphabetically.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MINOR AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID AND T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR = '1970' AND T2.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA > 337.59 AND T3.MAIZE_AREA_1000HA > 2.5 GROUP BY T1.DIST_NAME HAVING COUNT(T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY T1.DIST_NAME ASC

question: Identify the districts and their respective states that achieved a yield of over 337.59 kg/ha for either rice or maize during the year 1970.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.DIST_NAME, T1.STATE_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MINOR AS T4 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T4.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T3.YEAR = '1970' AND (T2.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA > 337.59 OR T4.MAIZE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA > 337.59);

question: List the names of districts and their respective states that recorded yields higher than 800 kg/ha for either rice or maize during the year 1970.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.DIST_NAME, T1.STATE_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MINOR AS T4 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T4.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T3.YEAR = '1970' AND (T2.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA > 800 OR T4.MAIZE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA > 800) ORDER BY T1.STATE_NAME

question: Identify the districts and their respective states that achieved a yield higher than 841.27 kg/ha for either rice or maize during the year 1970.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.DIST_NAME, T1.STATE_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID LEFT JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID AND T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID LEFT JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MINOR AS T4 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T4.GEOGRAPHY_ID AND T2.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T2.YEAR = '1970' AND (T3.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA > 841.27 OR T4.MAIZE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA > 841.27)

question: Provide a chronological overview of rice and wheat production and yield figures for the state of Chhattisgarh.
sql: SELECT T1.RICE_PRODUCTION_1000TONS, T1.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA, T1.WHEAT_PRODUCTION_1000TONS, T1.WHEAT_YIELD_KG_PER_HA FROM FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' ORDER BY T1.YEAR_ID

question: Provide a chronological report of rice and wheat production and yield statistics for all districts in Chhattisgarh.
sql: SELECT T2.YEAR, T1.DIST_NAME, T0.RICE_PRODUCTION_1000TONS, T0.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA, T0.WHEAT_PRODUCTION_1000TONS, T0.WHEAT_YIELD_KG_PER_HA FROM FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR T0 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY T1 ON T0.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR T2 ON T0.YEAR_ID = T2.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' ORDER BY T2.YEAR ASC

question: Provide a yearly breakdown of rice and wheat production and yield for districts in Chhattisgarh where rice production exceeded 185,000 tons, sorted by year and district name.
sql: SELECT T2.DIST_NAME, T3.YEAR, AVG(T1.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA), SUM(T1.RICE_PRODUCTION_1000TONS), AVG(T1.WHEAT_YIELD_KG_PER_HA), SUM(T1.WHEAT_PRODUCTION_1000TONS) FROM FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T1.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' GROUP BY T2.DIST_NAME, T3.YEAR HAVING SUM(T1.RICE_PRODUCTION_1000TONS) > 185.0 ORDER BY T3.YEAR DESC, T2.DIST_NAME ASC

question: Provide the average yields for rice and wheat across different states.

question: Provide the average rice and wheat yields for each state, listed in alphabetical order.

question: Rank the states by their average rice yield in descending order, also showing the average wheat yield for each.

question: Which districts and states achieved a rice yield exceeding 841.27 kg per hectare in 1970?
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME, T1.STATE_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T2.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA > 841.27 AND T3.YEAR = '1970';

question: List the names of districts and their respective states that achieved a rice yield greater than 337.59 kg per hectare in 1970, ordered alphabetically by district.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME, T1.STATE_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T2.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA > 337.59 AND T3.YEAR = '1970' ORDER BY T1.DIST_NAME ASC

question: Identify the districts and their corresponding states that achieved an average rice yield exceeding 337.59 kg per hectare during the year 1970, sorted alphabetically by state.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME, T1.STATE_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T2.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA > 337.59 AND T3.YEAR = '1970' GROUP BY T1.DIST_NAME, T1.STATE_NAME HAVING AVG(T2.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) > 337.59 ORDER BY T1.STATE_NAME ASC

question: Which districts in Chhattisgarh achieved a rice yield exceeding 841.27 kg/ha and a wheat yield over 454.55 kg/ha during the year 1970?
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR = '1970' AND T2.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA > 841.27 AND T2.WHEAT_YIELD_KG_PER_HA > 454.55

question: List the districts in Chhattisgarh that achieved yields of over 337.59 kg/ha for both rice and wheat during the year 1970, sorted alphabetically.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR = '1970' AND T2.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA > 337.59 AND T2.WHEAT_YIELD_KG_PER_HA > 337.59 ORDER BY T1.DIST_NAME ASC

question: Which districts in Chhattisgarh achieved a maximum yield of over 337.59 kg/ha for rice and 454.55 kg/ha for wheat during the year 1970? Please list them in alphabetical order.
sql: SELECT T2.DIST_NAME FROM FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T1.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR = '1970' GROUP BY T2.DIST_NAME HAVING MAX(T1.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) > 337.59 AND MAX(T1.WHEAT_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) > 454.55 ORDER BY T2.DIST_NAME ASC

question: Identify the districts that have produced more than 500,000 tons of either rice or wheat.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.DIST_NAME FROM FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T0 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 ON T0.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T0.RICE_PRODUCTION_1000TONS > 500 OR T0.WHEAT_PRODUCTION_1000TONS > 500;

question: Identify the districts that have produced more than 400,800 tons of rice or more than 26,500 tons of wheat.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T2.RICE_PRODUCTION_1000TONS > 400.8 OR T2.WHEAT_PRODUCTION_1000TONS > 26.5

question: Identify the districts that have recorded rice production over 400,800 tons or wheat production exceeding 26,500 tons, and whose combined yield of these cereals totals more than 185,000 tons.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T2.RICE_PRODUCTION_1000TONS > 400.8 OR T2.WHEAT_PRODUCTION_1000TONS > 26.5 GROUP BY T1.DIST_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.RICE_PRODUCTION_1000TONS + T2.WHEAT_PRODUCTION_1000TONS) > 185.0 ORDER BY T1.DIST_NAME ASC

question: Provide the area and production figures for pearl millet in the Durg district of Chhattisgarh for the year 1970.
sql: SELECT T1.PEARL_MILLET_AREA_1000HA, T1.PEARL_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS FROM FACT_MILLETS AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T1.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T2.DIST_NAME = 'Durg' AND T3.YEAR = '1970'

question: For the year 1970, provide the pearl millet cultivation area and production totals for all districts in Chhattisgarh, ordered by the size of the area planted.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, T1.DIST_NAME, T2.PEARL_MILLET_AREA_1000HA, T2.PEARL_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_MILLETS AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR = '1970' ORDER BY T2.PEARL_MILLET_AREA_1000HA

question: Provide a district-wise breakdown of the total area and production of pearl millet in Chhattisgarh for the year 1970, ranked by production volume.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME, T1.STATE_NAME, SUM(T2.PEARL_MILLET_AREA_1000HA), SUM(T2.PEARL_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 INNER JOIN FACT_MILLETS AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID INNER JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR = '1970' GROUP BY T1.DIST_NAME, T1.STATE_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.PEARL_MILLET_AREA_1000HA) >= 0.0 ORDER BY SUM(T2.PEARL_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS) DESC

question: Provide a state-wise summary of the average yield and total production for both pearl and finger millets between 1966 and 1970.
sql: SELECT AVG(T1.PEARL_MILLET_YIELD_KG_PER_HA), SUM(T1.PEARL_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS), AVG(T1.FINGER_MILLET_YIELD_KG_PER_HA), SUM(T1.FINGER_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS), T2.STATE_NAME FROM FACT_MILLETS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR T3 ON T1.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.YEAR BETWEEN '1966' AND '1970' GROUP BY T2.STATE_NAME

question: Provide a state-wise summary of the average yields and total production for pearl and finger millets between 1966 and 1970.
sql: SELECT T2.STATE_NAME, AVG(T1.PEARL_MILLET_YIELD_KG_PER_HA), AVG(T1.FINGER_MILLET_YIELD_KG_PER_HA), SUM(T1.PEARL_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS), SUM(T1.FINGER_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS) FROM FACT_MILLETS AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T1.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.YEAR BETWEEN '1966' AND '1970' GROUP BY T2.STATE_NAME

question: Provide a state-wise summary of average yields and total production for pearl and finger millets between 1966 and 1970.
sql: SELECT T2.STATE_NAME, AVG(T1.PEARL_MILLET_YIELD_KG_PER_HA), AVG(T1.FINGER_MILLET_YIELD_KG_PER_HA), SUM(T1.PEARL_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS), SUM(T1.FINGER_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS) FROM FACT_MILLETS AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T1.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.YEAR BETWEEN '1966' AND '1970' GROUP BY T2.STATE_NAME HAVING COUNT(T1.MILLET_ID) > 0 ORDER BY T2.STATE_NAME ASC

question: Rank the districts in Chhattisgarh by their pearl millet yield from highest to lowest for the year 1970.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_MILLETS AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR = '1970' ORDER BY T2.PEARL_MILLET_YIELD_KG_PER_HA DESC

question: List the districts in Chhattisgarh ranked by their pearl millet yield from highest to lowest for the year 1970.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_MILLETS AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR = '1970' ORDER BY T2.PEARL_MILLET_YIELD_KG_PER_HA DESC

question: Rank the districts in Chhattisgarh by their average pearl millet yield for the year 1970, from highest to lowest.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME, AVG(T3.PEARL_MILLET_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 INNER JOIN FACT_MILLETS AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID INNER JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T2 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T2.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T2.YEAR = '1970' GROUP BY T1.DIST_NAME HAVING AVG(T3.PEARL_MILLET_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) >= 0.0 ORDER BY AVG(T3.PEARL_MILLET_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) DESC

question: Identify the top 10 districts in Chhattisgarh that had the highest pearl millet production in 1970.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_MILLETS AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR = '1970' ORDER BY T2.PEARL_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS DESC LIMIT 10

question: List the top 10 districts in Chhattisgarh that had the highest pearl millet production in 1970.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_MILLETS AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR = '1970' ORDER BY T2.PEARL_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS DESC LIMIT 10

question: Identify the top 10 districts in Chhattisgarh with the highest pearl millet production in 1970.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME, SUM(T2.PEARL_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_MILLETS AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR = '1970' GROUP BY T1.DIST_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T2.PEARL_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS) DESC LIMIT 10

question: Provide the pearl millet yields for districts in Chhattisgarh between 1966 and 1970.
sql: SELECT T2.DIST_NAME, T3.YEAR, T1.PEARL_MILLET_YIELD_KG_PER_HA FROM FACT_MILLETS AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T1.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR BETWEEN '1966' AND '1970'

question: Provide the pearl millet yields for districts in Chhattisgarh between 1966 and 1970, ordered chronologically.
sql: SELECT T2.DIST_NAME, T3.YEAR, T1.PEARL_MILLET_YIELD_KG_PER_HA FROM FACT_MILLETS AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T1.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR BETWEEN '1966' AND '1970' ORDER BY T3.YEAR

question: Provide a yearly breakdown of pearl millet yields for districts in Chhattisgarh between 1966 and 1970, sorted chronologically with the highest yields appearing first.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME, T2.YEAR, SUM(T3.PEARL_MILLET_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 INNER JOIN FACT_MILLETS AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID INNER JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T2 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T2.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T2.YEAR BETWEEN '1966' AND '1970' GROUP BY T1.DIST_NAME, T2.YEAR HAVING SUM(T3.PEARL_MILLET_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) >= 0.0 ORDER BY T2.YEAR ASC, SUM(T3.PEARL_MILLET_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) DESC

question: List the districts in Chhattisgarh that produced exactly 200 tons of finger millet and at least some pearl millet during the year 1970, sorted alphabetically.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_MILLETS AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR = '1970' AND T2.PEARL_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS >= 0.0 AND T2.FINGER_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS = 0.2 GROUP BY T1.DIST_NAME ORDER BY T1.DIST_NAME

question: Identify the districts in Chhattisgarh that recorded pearl millet production in 1970 but had no instances of finger millet production exceeding 200 tons.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_MILLETS AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR = '1970' AND T2.PEARL_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS >= 0.0 GROUP BY T1.DIST_NAME HAVING COUNT(CASE WHEN T2.FINGER_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS > 0.2 THEN 1 END) = 0 ORDER BY T1.DIST_NAME ASC

question: Which districts produced both pearl millet and more than 200 tons of finger millet in 1970?
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_MILLETS AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.YEAR = '1970' AND T2.PEARL_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS > 0.0 AND T2.FINGER_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS > 0.2

question: Which districts produced both pearl millet and more than 200 tons of finger millet in 1970? Please list them in alphabetical order.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_MILLETS AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.YEAR = '1970' AND T2.PEARL_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS > 0.0 AND T2.FINGER_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS > 0.2 GROUP BY T1.DIST_NAME ORDER BY T1.DIST_NAME ASC

question: Which districts in Chhattisgarh produced more than 200 tons of either finger millet or pearl millet in 1970?
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_MILLETS AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR = '1970' AND T2.FINGER_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS > 0.2 UNION SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_MILLETS AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR = '1970' AND T2.PEARL_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS > 0.2

question: Which districts in Chhattisgarh produced more than 200 tons of either finger millet or pearl millet in 1970?
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_MILLETS AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.YEAR = '1970' AND T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T2.FINGER_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS > 0.2 UNION SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_MILLETS AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.YEAR = '1970' AND T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T2.PEARL_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS > 0.2

question: Which districts in Chhattisgarh produced more than 200 tons of either finger millet or pearl millet in 1970?
sql: SELECT T2.DIST_NAME FROM FACT_MILLETS AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T1.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR = '1970' AND T1.FINGER_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS > 0.2 UNION SELECT T2.DIST_NAME FROM FACT_MILLETS AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T1.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR = '1970' AND T1.PEARL_MILLET_PRODUCTION_1000TONS > 0.2

question: Provide the production and yield statistics for chickpeas and pigeon peas in Chhattisgarh for the year 1970.
sql: SELECT T1.CHICKPEA_PRODUCTION_1000TONS, T1.CHICKPEA_YIELD_KG_PER_HA, T1.PIGEONPEA_PRODUCTION_1000TONS, T1.PIGEONPEA_YIELD_KG_PER_HA, T1.PULSE_MAJOR_ID FROM FACT_PULSES_MAJOR AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T1.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR = '1970';

question: Provide the production and yield statistics for chickpeas and pigeon peas across all districts in Chhattisgarh for the year 1970, ordered by district name.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME, T0.CHICKPEA_PRODUCTION_1000TONS, T0.CHICKPEA_YIELD_KG_PER_HA, T0.PIGEONPEA_PRODUCTION_1000TONS, T0.PIGEONPEA_YIELD_KG_PER_HA FROM FACT_PULSES_MAJOR T0 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY T1 ON T0.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR T2 ON T0.YEAR_ID = T2.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T2.YEAR = '1970' ORDER BY T1.DIST_NAME

question: List the names and codes for districts in Chhattisgarh that produced more than 10,000 tons of chickpeas in 1970, ordered alphabetically by district name.
sql: SELECT T1.YEAR, T3.DIST_NAME, T3.STATE_NAME, T3.DIST_CODE, T3.STATE_CODE FROM DIM_YEAR AS T1 INNER JOIN FACT_PULSES_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.YEAR_ID = T2.YEAR_ID INNER JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T3 ON T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T1.YEAR = '1970' AND T3.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' GROUP BY T1.YEAR, T3.DIST_NAME, T3.STATE_NAME, T3.DIST_CODE, T3.STATE_CODE HAVING SUM(T2.CHICKPEA_PRODUCTION_1000TONS) > 10.0 ORDER BY T3.DIST_NAME ASC

question: Calculate the average yield for chickpeas and pigeon peas in each state for the period between 1966 and 1970.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, AVG(T3.CHICKPEA_YIELD_KG_PER_HA), AVG(T3.PIGEONPEA_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_PULSES_MAJOR AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T2 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T2.YEAR_ID WHERE T2.YEAR BETWEEN '1966' AND '1970' GROUP BY T1.STATE_NAME

question: Calculate the average yield for chickpeas and pigeon peas in each state for the period between 1966 and 1970.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, AVG(T2.CHICKPEA_YIELD_KG_PER_HA), AVG(T2.PIGEONPEA_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_PULSES_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.YEAR BETWEEN '1966' AND '1970' GROUP BY T1.STATE_NAME

question: For states with data available for more than one year, show the average yields of chickpeas and pigeon peas recorded between 1966 and 1970, ordered alphabetically by state.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, AVG(T2.CHICKPEA_YIELD_KG_PER_HA), AVG(T2.PIGEONPEA_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_PULSES_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.YEAR BETWEEN '1966' AND '1970' GROUP BY T1.STATE_NAME HAVING COUNT(T3.YEAR) > 1 ORDER BY T1.STATE_NAME ASC

question: Which districts in Chhattisgarh achieved a chickpea yield of more than 500 kg per hectare during the year 1967?
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_PULSES_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T2.CHICKPEA_YIELD_KG_PER_HA > 500.0 AND T3.YEAR = '1967'

question: List the districts in Chhattisgarh that achieved a chickpea yield higher than 448.34 kg per hectare in 1968, ordered from highest to lowest yield.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_PULSES_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR = '1968' AND T2.CHICKPEA_YIELD_KG_PER_HA > 448.34 ORDER BY T2.CHICKPEA_YIELD_KG_PER_HA DESC

question: Which districts in Chhattisgarh achieved an average chickpea yield of more than 400 kg per hectare during 1970? Please list them in descending order of their average yield.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_PULSES_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR = '1970' GROUP BY T1.DIST_NAME HAVING AVG(T2.CHICKPEA_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) > 400 ORDER BY AVG(T2.CHICKPEA_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) DESC

question: Rank the districts in Chhattisgarh by their chickpea yield for the year 1970, from highest to lowest.
sql: SELECT T2.DIST_NAME, T1.CHICKPEA_YIELD_KG_PER_HA FROM FACT_PULSES_MAJOR AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T1.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR = '1970' ORDER BY T1.CHICKPEA_YIELD_KG_PER_HA DESC

question: Rank the districts in Chhattisgarh by their chickpea yield per hectare for the year 1970, starting with the highest.
sql: SELECT T2.DIST_NAME, T1.CHICKPEA_YIELD_KG_PER_HA FROM FACT_PULSES_MAJOR AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T1.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR = '1970' ORDER BY T1.CHICKPEA_YIELD_KG_PER_HA DESC

question: Rank the districts in Chhattisgarh by their average chickpea yield for the year 1970, from highest to lowest.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME, AVG(T2.CHICKPEA_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_PULSES_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR = '1970' GROUP BY T1.DIST_NAME ORDER BY AVG(T2.CHICKPEA_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) DESC

question: List the top 10 districts with the highest chickpea yields recorded in 1970.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_PULSES_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.YEAR = '1970' ORDER BY T2.CHICKPEA_YIELD_KG_PER_HA DESC LIMIT 10

question: Which ten districts recorded the highest chickpea yields in 1970?
sql: SELECT T2.DIST_NAME, T1.CHICKPEA_YIELD_KG_PER_HA FROM FACT_PULSES_MAJOR AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T1.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.YEAR = '1970' ORDER BY T1.CHICKPEA_YIELD_KG_PER_HA DESC LIMIT 10

question: Identify the top 10 districts with the highest average chickpea yield recorded in 1970.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME, AVG(T2.CHICKPEA_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_PULSES_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.YEAR = '1970' GROUP BY T1.DIST_NAME ORDER BY AVG(T2.CHICKPEA_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) DESC LIMIT 10

question: Provide the chickpea and pigeon pea yields for each district and state recorded during the year 1970.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME, T1.STATE_NAME, T2.CHICKPEA_YIELD_KG_PER_HA, T2.PIGEONPEA_YIELD_KG_PER_HA FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_PULSES_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.YEAR = '1970';

question: Provide the chickpea and pigeon pea yields for each district and state recorded in 1970, ordered alphabetically by district name.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME, T1.STATE_NAME, T2.CHICKPEA_YIELD_KG_PER_HA, T2.PIGEONPEA_YIELD_KG_PER_HA FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_PULSES_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.YEAR = '1970' ORDER BY T1.DIST_NAME

question: Rank the districts and states by their average chickpea yield from 1970, also showing the average pigeon pea yield for that year.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME, T1.STATE_NAME, AVG(T2.CHICKPEA_YIELD_KG_PER_HA), AVG(T2.PIGEONPEA_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_PULSES_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.YEAR = '1970' GROUP BY T1.DIST_NAME, T1.STATE_NAME ORDER BY AVG(T2.CHICKPEA_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) DESC

question: Which districts in Chhattisgarh produced more than 15,000 tons of chickpeas but no more than 35,200 tons of pigeon peas during the year 1970?
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_PULSES_MAJOR AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T2 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T2.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T2.YEAR = '1970' GROUP BY T1.DIST_NAME HAVING SUM(T3.CHICKPEA_PRODUCTION_1000TONS) > 15.0 AND NOT SUM(T3.PIGEONPEA_PRODUCTION_1000TONS) > 35.2

question: Which districts produced more than 23,000 tons of chickpeas and 15,000 tons of pigeon peas in 1970?
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_PULSES_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.YEAR = '1970' AND T2.CHICKPEA_PRODUCTION_1000TONS > 23.0 AND T2.PIGEONPEA_PRODUCTION_1000TONS > 15.0

question: Which districts produced more than 23,000 tons of chickpeas and over 15,000 tons of pigeon peas in 1970?
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_PULSES_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.YEAR = '1970' AND T2.CHICKPEA_PRODUCTION_1000TONS > 23.0 AND T2.PIGEONPEA_PRODUCTION_1000TONS > 15.0

question: Identify the districts that produced more than 15,000 tons of both chickpeas and pigeon peas in 1970, listed in alphabetical order.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_PULSES_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.YEAR = '1970' GROUP BY T1.DIST_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.CHICKPEA_PRODUCTION_1000TONS) > 15.0 AND SUM(T2.PIGEONPEA_PRODUCTION_1000TONS) > 15.0 ORDER BY T1.DIST_NAME ASC

question: Which districts recorded a yield higher than 448.34 kg/ha for chickpeas or 784.31 kg/ha for pigeon peas during the year 1970?
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_PULSES_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.YEAR = '1970' AND (T2.CHICKPEA_YIELD_KG_PER_HA > 448.34 OR T2.PIGEONPEA_YIELD_KG_PER_HA > 784.31)

question: Which districts recorded a yield higher than 448.34 kg/ha for chickpeas or 784.31 kg/ha for pigeon peas during the year 1970?
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_PULSES_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.YEAR = '1970' AND (T2.CHICKPEA_YIELD_KG_PER_HA > 448.34 OR T2.PIGEONPEA_YIELD_KG_PER_HA > 784.31)

question: Identify the districts that recorded a maximum yield of over 400 kg/ha for chickpeas or over 700 kg/ha for pigeon peas during the year 1970, listed in alphabetical order.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_PULSES_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.YEAR = '1970' GROUP BY T1.DIST_NAME HAVING MAX(T2.CHICKPEA_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) > 400.0 OR MAX(T2.PIGEONPEA_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) > 700.0 ORDER BY T1.DIST_NAME ASC

question: Provide a yearly breakdown of area and production figures for groundnut and soybean crops across districts in Chhattisgarh, ordered chronologically.
sql: SELECT T2.DIST_NAME, T3.YEAR, T1.GROUNDNUT_AREA_1000HA, T1.GROUNDNUT_PRODUCTION_1000TONS, T1.SOYABEAN_AREA_1000HA, T1.SOYABEAN_PRODUCTION_1000TONS FROM FACT_OILSEEDS_MAJOR AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T1.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' ORDER BY T3.YEAR

question: Provide a yearly breakdown of groundnut and soybean cultivation area and production totals for districts in Chhattisgarh, specifically for years where groundnut was actually grown, sorted from most recent to oldest.
sql: SELECT T2.DIST_NAME, T3.YEAR, SUM(T1.GROUNDNUT_AREA_1000HA), SUM(T1.GROUNDNUT_PRODUCTION_1000TONS), SUM(T1.SOYABEAN_AREA_1000HA), SUM(T1.SOYABEAN_PRODUCTION_1000TONS) FROM FACT_OILSEEDS_MAJOR AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID INNER JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T1.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' GROUP BY T2.DIST_NAME, T3.YEAR HAVING SUM(T1.GROUNDNUT_AREA_1000HA) > 0.0 ORDER BY T3.YEAR DESC

question: Provide the average yields for soybeans and groundnuts by state for the period between 1966 and 1970.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, AVG(T2.SOYABEAN_YIELD_KG_PER_HA), AVG(T2.GROUNDNUT_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OILSEEDS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.YEAR BETWEEN '1966' AND '1970' GROUP BY T1.STATE_NAME

question: Provide the average yields for soybeans and groundnuts by state for the period between 1966 and 1970, ordered alphabetically by state name.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, AVG(T2.SOYABEAN_YIELD_KG_PER_HA), AVG(T2.GROUNDNUT_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OILSEEDS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.YEAR BETWEEN '1966' AND '1970' GROUP BY T1.STATE_NAME ORDER BY T1.STATE_NAME

question: For the period between 1966 and 1970, provide the average yields of soybean and groundnut for each state that has data for more than one year, sorted alphabetically by state name.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, AVG(T2.SOYABEAN_YIELD_KG_PER_HA), AVG(T2.GROUNDNUT_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OILSEEDS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.YEAR BETWEEN '1966' AND '1970' GROUP BY T1.STATE_NAME HAVING COUNT(T3.YEAR) > 1 ORDER BY T1.STATE_NAME ASC

question: Which districts in Chhattisgarh had an average groundnut yield exceeding 500 kg per hectare during the year 1970? Please list them in alphabetical order.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OILSEEDS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR = '1970' GROUP BY T1.DIST_NAME HAVING AVG(T2.GROUNDNUT_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) > 500.0 ORDER BY T1.DIST_NAME ASC

question: Rank the districts in Chhattisgarh by their soybean yield per hectare for the year 1970, from highest to lowest.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME, T2.SOYABEAN_YIELD_KG_PER_HA FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OILSEEDS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR = '1970' ORDER BY T2.SOYABEAN_YIELD_KG_PER_HA DESC

question: Rank the districts in Chhattisgarh by their soybean yield per hectare for the year 1970, from highest to lowest.
sql: SELECT T3.DIST_NAME, T1.SOYABEAN_YIELD_KG_PER_HA FROM FACT_OILSEEDS_MAJOR AS T1 JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T2 ON T1.YEAR_ID = T2.YEAR_ID JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T3.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T2.YEAR = '1970' ORDER BY T1.SOYABEAN_YIELD_KG_PER_HA DESC

question: Rank the districts in Chhattisgarh by their average soybean yield per hectare for the year 1970, from highest to lowest.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME, AVG(T3.SOYABEAN_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_OILSEEDS_MAJOR AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID AND T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T2.YEAR = '1970' GROUP BY T1.DIST_NAME ORDER BY AVG(T3.SOYABEAN_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) DESC

question: Which ten districts recorded the highest soybean yields in 1970?
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OILSEEDS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.YEAR = '1970' ORDER BY T2.SOYABEAN_YIELD_KG_PER_HA DESC LIMIT 10

question: Which ten districts recorded the highest soybean yields in 1970?
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OILSEEDS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.YEAR = '1970' ORDER BY T2.SOYABEAN_YIELD_KG_PER_HA DESC LIMIT 10

question: Which ten districts achieved the highest average soybean yields in 1970?
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME, AVG(T2.SOYABEAN_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OILSEEDS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.YEAR = '1970' GROUP BY T1.DIST_NAME ORDER BY AVG(T2.SOYABEAN_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) DESC LIMIT 10

question: Provide the production and yield statistics for groundnut and soybean across all districts in Chhattisgarh for the year 1970.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME, T2.GROUNDNUT_PRODUCTION_1000TONS, T2.GROUNDNUT_YIELD_KG_PER_HA, T2.SOYABEAN_PRODUCTION_1000TONS, T2.SOYABEAN_YIELD_KG_PER_HA FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OILSEEDS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR = '1970'

question: Provide the production and yield statistics for groundnut and soybean in Chhattisgarh for the year 1970.
sql: SELECT T1.YEAR, T2.GROUNDNUT_PRODUCTION_1000TONS, T2.GROUNDNUT_YIELD_KG_PER_HA, T2.SOYABEAN_PRODUCTION_1000TONS, T2.SOYABEAN_YIELD_KG_PER_HA FROM DIM_YEAR AS T1 JOIN FACT_OILSEEDS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.YEAR_ID = T2.YEAR_ID JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T3 ON T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T1.YEAR = '1970' AND T3.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' ORDER BY T1.YEAR

question: For the year 1970 in Chhattisgarh, provide a district-wise summary of production and average yield for groundnuts and soybeans, focusing only on districts with recorded groundnut production and ranking them by soybean output.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME, SUM(T2.GROUNDNUT_PRODUCTION_1000TONS) AS TOTAL_GROUNDNUT_PROD, SUM(T2.SOYABEAN_PRODUCTION_1000TONS) AS TOTAL_SOYABEAN_PROD, AVG(T2.GROUNDNUT_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) AS AVG_GROUNDNUT_YIELD, AVG(T2.SOYABEAN_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) AS AVG_SOYABEAN_YIELD FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 INNER JOIN FACT_OILSEEDS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID INNER JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR = '1970' GROUP BY T1.DIST_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.GROUNDNUT_PRODUCTION_1000TONS) > 0.0 ORDER BY SUM(T2.SOYABEAN_PRODUCTION_1000TONS) DESC

question: In Chhattisgarh during 1970, which districts produced more than 200 tons of rapeseed and mustard but had no soybean production at all? List them alphabetically.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OILSEEDS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR = '1970' AND T2.SOYABEAN_PRODUCTION_1000TONS = 0.0 AND T2.RAPESEED_MUSTARD_PRODUCTION_1000TONS > 0.2 GROUP BY T1.DIST_NAME ORDER BY T1.DIST_NAME

question: List the districts in Chhattisgarh that produced soybeans in 1970 but had rapeseed and mustard production of 0.5 thousand tons or less, ordered alphabetically.
sql: SELECT T2.DIST_NAME FROM FACT_OILSEEDS_MAJOR AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T1.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR = '1970' AND T1.SOYABEAN_PRODUCTION_1000TONS >= 0.0 AND T2.DIST_NAME NOT IN (SELECT T2_sub.DIST_NAME FROM FACT_OILSEEDS_MAJOR AS T1_sub JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T2_sub ON T1_sub.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2_sub.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3_sub ON T1_sub.YEAR_ID = T3_sub.YEAR_ID WHERE T2_sub.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3_sub.YEAR = '1970' AND T1_sub.RAPESEED_MUSTARD_PRODUCTION_1000TONS > 0.5) GROUP BY T2.DIST_NAME ORDER BY T2.DIST_NAME ASC

question: List the names of districts that cultivated both groundnuts and soybeans in 1970, ordered alphabetically.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OILSEEDS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.YEAR = '1970' AND T2.GROUNDNUT_AREA_1000HA > 0.1 AND T2.SOYABEAN_AREA_1000HA > 0.0 ORDER BY T1.DIST_NAME ASC

question: Which districts cultivated both groundnuts and soybeans in 1970? List them in alphabetical order.
sql: SELECT T3.DIST_NAME FROM FACT_OILSEEDS_MAJOR AS T1 JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T2 ON T1.YEAR_ID = T2.YEAR_ID JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T2.YEAR = '1970' GROUP BY T3.DIST_NAME HAVING SUM(T1.GROUNDNUT_AREA_1000HA) > 0.1 AND SUM(T1.SOYABEAN_AREA_1000HA) > 0.0 ORDER BY T3.DIST_NAME ASC

question: Which districts in 1970 recorded either a groundnut yield exceeding 500 kg per hectare or any soybean production?
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OILSEEDS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.YEAR = '1970' AND (T2.GROUNDNUT_YIELD_KG_PER_HA > 500.0 OR T2.SOYABEAN_PRODUCTION_1000TONS > 0.0)

question: Identify the districts that in 1970 either produced soybeans or achieved a groundnut yield exceeding 500 kg per hectare, listed in alphabetical order.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OILSEEDS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.YEAR = '1970' AND (T2.GROUNDNUT_YIELD_KG_PER_HA > 500.0 OR T2.SOYABEAN_PRODUCTION_1000TONS > 0.0) GROUP BY T1.DIST_NAME ORDER BY T1.DIST_NAME ASC

question: Identify the districts that in 1970 either achieved a groundnut yield exceeding 500 kg/ha or recorded any soybean production, listed in alphabetical order.
sql: SELECT T3.DIST_NAME FROM FACT_OILSEEDS_MAJOR AS T1 JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T2 ON T1.YEAR_ID = T2.YEAR_ID JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T2.YEAR = '1970' GROUP BY T3.DIST_NAME HAVING SUM(T1.GROUNDNUT_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) > 500.0 OR SUM(T1.SOYABEAN_PRODUCTION_1000TONS) > 0.0 ORDER BY T3.DIST_NAME ASC

question: Provide the annual sunflower cultivation statistics, including area, production, and yield, for all districts in Chhattisgarh, ordered chronologically.
sql: SELECT T1.SUNFLOWER_AREA_1000HA, T1.SUNFLOWER_PRODUCTION_1000TONS, T1.SUNFLOWER_YIELD_KG_PER_HA, T2.DIST_NAME FROM FACT_OILSEEDS_SUNFLOWER AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T1.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' ORDER BY T3.YEAR

question: Provide a yearly breakdown of sunflower cultivation statistics, including area, production, and yield, for all districts in Chhattisgarh.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME, T1.STATE_NAME, T2.SUNFLOWER_AREA_1000HA, T2.SUNFLOWER_PRODUCTION_1000TONS, T2.SUNFLOWER_YIELD_KG_PER_HA, T3.YEAR FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OILSEEDS_SUNFLOWER AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' ORDER BY T3.YEAR

question: Provide a yearly summary of sunflower cultivation in Chhattisgarh, including total area, average production, and peak yield, sorted from the most recent year.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, T2.YEAR, SUM(T3.SUNFLOWER_AREA_1000HA), AVG(T3.SUNFLOWER_PRODUCTION_1000TONS), MAX(T3.SUNFLOWER_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OILSEEDS_SUNFLOWER AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T2 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T2.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' GROUP BY T1.STATE_NAME, T2.YEAR HAVING AVG(T3.SUNFLOWER_PRODUCTION_1000TONS) >= 0.0 ORDER BY T2.YEAR DESC, T1.STATE_NAME ASC

question: Provide the average sunflower yield and total sunflower production for each state.
sql: SELECT T2.STATE_NAME, AVG(T1.SUNFLOWER_YIELD_KG_PER_HA), SUM(T1.SUNFLOWER_PRODUCTION_1000TONS) FROM FACT_OILSEEDS_SUNFLOWER AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID GROUP BY T2.STATE_NAME

question: Provide a state-wise breakdown of average sunflower yields and total production volumes, sorted alphabetically by state name.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, AVG(T2.SUNFLOWER_YIELD_KG_PER_HA), SUM(T2.SUNFLOWER_PRODUCTION_1000TONS) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OILSEEDS_SUNFLOWER AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID GROUP BY T1.STATE_NAME ORDER BY T1.STATE_NAME ASC

question: For the state of Chhattisgarh, what was the average yield and total production of sunflowers during the late 1960s?
sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, AVG(T2.SUNFLOWER_YIELD_KG_PER_HA), SUM(T2.SUNFLOWER_PRODUCTION_1000TONS) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OILSEEDS_SUNFLOWER AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR IN ('1970', '1966', '1968', '1969', '1967') GROUP BY T1.STATE_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T2.SUNFLOWER_PRODUCTION_1000TONS) DESC

question: List the names of districts in Chhattisgarh that reported sunflower yield data for the year 1970, sorted alphabetically.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OILSEEDS_SUNFLOWER AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR = '1970' GROUP BY T1.DIST_NAME HAVING AVG(T2.SUNFLOWER_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) >= 0.0 ORDER BY T1.DIST_NAME ASC

question: Rank the districts in Chhattisgarh by their sunflower yield per hectare for the year 1970, from highest to lowest.
sql: SELECT T2.DIST_NAME, T1.SUNFLOWER_YIELD_KG_PER_HA FROM FACT_OILSEEDS_SUNFLOWER AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T1.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR = '1970' ORDER BY T1.SUNFLOWER_YIELD_KG_PER_HA DESC

question: Rank the districts in Chhattisgarh by their sunflower yield per hectare for the year 1970, from highest to lowest.
sql: SELECT T2.DIST_NAME, T1.SUNFLOWER_YIELD_KG_PER_HA FROM FACT_OILSEEDS_SUNFLOWER AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T1.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR = '1970' ORDER BY T1.SUNFLOWER_YIELD_KG_PER_HA DESC

question: Rank the districts in Chhattisgarh by their average sunflower yield from the year 1970, starting with the highest.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME, AVG(T2.SUNFLOWER_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OILSEEDS_SUNFLOWER AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR = '1970' GROUP BY T1.DIST_NAME ORDER BY AVG(T2.SUNFLOWER_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) DESC

question: List the top five districts in Chhattisgarh with the highest sunflower yields recorded in 1970.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OILSEEDS_SUNFLOWER AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR = '1970' ORDER BY T2.SUNFLOWER_YIELD_KG_PER_HA DESC LIMIT 5

question: Which five districts in Chhattisgarh had the highest sunflower yields in 1970?
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OILSEEDS_SUNFLOWER AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T3.YEAR = '1970' ORDER BY T2.SUNFLOWER_YIELD_KG_PER_HA DESC LIMIT 5

question: Identify the top 5 districts in Chhattisgarh with the highest sunflower yields for the year 1970.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME, SUM(T3.SUNFLOWER_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OILSEEDS_SUNFLOWER AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T2 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T2.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Chhattisgarh' AND T2.YEAR = '1970' GROUP BY T1.DIST_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T3.SUNFLOWER_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) DESC LIMIT 5

question: Identify the states and districts that recorded active sunflower production for each year.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, T1.DIST_NAME, T2.YEAR FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OILSEEDS_SUNFLOWER AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T2 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T2.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.SUNFLOWER_PRODUCTION_1000TONS > 0.0

question: List the states and districts that recorded sunflower production, ordered chronologically by year.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, T1.DIST_NAME, T2.YEAR FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OILSEEDS_SUNFLOWER AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T2 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T2.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.SUNFLOWER_PRODUCTION_1000TONS > 0.0 ORDER BY T2.YEAR ASC

question: Provide a list of states and districts that had active sunflower production, ordered by the most recent year.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, T1.DIST_NAME, T2.YEAR FROM FACT_OILSEEDS_SUNFLOWER AS T0 INNER JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 ON T0.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID INNER JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T2 ON T0.YEAR_ID = T2.YEAR_ID WHERE T0.SUNFLOWER_PRODUCTION_1000TONS > 0.0 GROUP BY T1.STATE_NAME, T1.DIST_NAME, T2.YEAR ORDER BY T2.YEAR DESC

question: Which districts reported sunflower production in 1970 but did not have any land area dedicated to sunflower cultivation back in 1966?
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OILSEEDS_SUNFLOWER AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.YEAR = '1970' AND T2.SUNFLOWER_PRODUCTION_1000TONS > 0.0 EXCEPT SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OILSEEDS_SUNFLOWER AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.YEAR = '1966' AND T2.SUNFLOWER_AREA_1000HA > 0.0

question: Identify the districts that reported sunflower production in 1970 but did not have any land area dedicated to sunflower cultivation back in 1966.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OILSEEDS_SUNFLOWER AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.YEAR = '1970' AND T2.SUNFLOWER_PRODUCTION_1000TONS >= 0.0 EXCEPT SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OILSEEDS_SUNFLOWER AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.YEAR = '1966' AND T2.SUNFLOWER_AREA_1000HA > 0.0

question: Identify the districts that produced sunflower crops in 1970 but did not have any recorded sunflower cultivation area back in 1966, listed in alphabetical order.
sql: SELECT T1.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OILSEEDS_SUNFLOWER AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.YEAR = '1970' GROUP BY T1.DIST_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.SUNFLOWER_PRODUCTION_1000TONS) >= 0.0 AND T1.DIST_NAME NOT IN ( SELECT T1_SUB.DIST_NAME FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1_SUB JOIN FACT_OILSEEDS_SUNFLOWER AS T2_SUB ON T1_SUB.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2_SUB.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3_SUB ON T2_SUB.YEAR_ID = T3_SUB.YEAR_ID WHERE T3_SUB.YEAR = '1966' AND T2_SUB.SUNFLOWER_AREA_1000HA > 0.0 ) ORDER BY T1.DIST_NAME ASC
